# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    host: users-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    retries: 3
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /users
          - /users/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

  - name: orders-service
    host: orders-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    retries: 3
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /orders
          - /orders/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

  - name: inventory-service
    host: inventory-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    retries: 3
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /inventory
          - /inventory/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 3
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 202, 204, 301, 302, 304]
        unhealthy:
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    targets:
      - target: users-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    hash_on: none
    hash_fallback: none
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 3
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 202, 204, 301, 302, 304]
        unhealthy:
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    targets:
      - target: orders-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: consistent-hashing
    hash_on: header
    hash_on_header: x-user-id
    hash_fallback: ip
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 3
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 202, 204, 301, 302, 304]
        unhealthy:
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    targets:
      - target: inventory-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100
